title: Challenger-Prometheus Replan Loop Cap
description: Validates that Atlas caps the Challenger→Prometheus revision loop at 2 iterations

inputs.label: first-revision-succeeds
inputs.description: Challenger finds issues, Prometheus revises, Challenger approves on second pass

inputs.label: two-revisions-then-approve
inputs.description: Challenger finds issues twice, Prometheus revises twice, Challenger approves on third pass

inputs.label: cap-exceeded-escalates
inputs.description: After 2 revision rounds, if Challenger still rejects, escalate to user

iteration_3_would_be.note: Atlas does NOT run a 3rd revision. Instead, escalates.

expected_behavior.user_sees: Challenger findings from both rounds plus Prometheus revision attempts

assertions: Maximum 2 Challenger→Prometheus revision rounds before escalation
Each revision round sends Challenger findings to Prometheus as revision context
If Challenger approves within 2 rounds, pipeline proceeds to ACTING
If 2 rounds exhausted without approval, Atlas escalates to user
Escalation includes accumulated findings from all rounds
